fields.description: Warehouse where this minimum order size applies. Matched by item + warehouse during MR / PP creation.
fields.label: Warehouse

fields.description: Unit of measurement for the minimum qty below. Must be configured in UOM Conversion Detail on this item (or equal to Stock UOM).
fields.label: UOM

fields.description: Minimum quantity to purchase or produce per replenishment cycle. If the calculated shortage is below this value, the MR / Production Plan qty is raised to this floor. Example: a supplier box of 24 units → enter 24 here with UOM = Box.
fields.label: Min Purchase / Production Qty

fields.description: Auto-populated from Item Stock UOM. Shows the base unit used in all inventory calculations.
fields.label: Stock UOM

fields.description: Auto-populated: 1 [UOM] = [this value] [Stock UOM]. Fetched from UOM Conversion Detail on the parent item. If UOM equals Stock UOM, this is 1.0.
fields.label: Stock UOM Conversion

fields.description: Auto-calculated: Min Purchase / Production Qty × conversion_factor. This is the effective minimum in Stock UOM — the actual value used by the MR and Production Plan automation.
fields.label: Stock UOM Qty
